bird.name: 布島扇尾鸚鵡
bird.summary: 布島扇尾鸚鵡 (學名Prioniturus mada)，是一種僅見於印尼布魯島的鸚鵡。 描述 本種呈綠色，身長 32 公分（12.5 英吋）。喙黑色，喙基色較淺。尾下覆羽黃色。成年雄鳥背藍色，自頭後延伸至背脊中間，再到前翅上方。雌鳥的藍色斑僅見於頸背。

locations.name: 森林
locations.summary: 森林，是一个高密度树木的区域（或历史上，森林是一个为狩猎而留出的荒地），涵蓋大約9.4％的地球表面（或佔約30％的總土地面積）。聯合國糧食及農業組織(FAO)將森林定義為「面積超過 0.5 公頃、樹木超過 5 公尺且樹冠覆蓋率超過 10%…

relations.subject: 布島扇尾鸚鵡
relations.evidence: Prioniturus mada is usually found in elevations up to approximately 1600 meters where it is found in many different types of forest habitat

relations.subject: 布島扇尾鸚鵡
relations.evidence: Like most other Indonesian birds, the Buru racket-tail is threatened by habitat destruction due to deforestation to make ways for plantations (especially palm oil), logging, and mining operations
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: 布島扇尾鸚鵡
relations.evidence: Like most other Indonesian birds, the Buru racket-tail is threatened by habitat destruction due to deforestation to make ways for plantations (especially palm oil), logging, and mining operations
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
